main_takeaway: The one idea the viewer should remember

brand.style: clean modern sans-serif, premium, high contrast

images.headline: Short Hook
images.visual_direction: One focal visual, generous whitespace, brand colors.

images.headline: Name The Problem
images.supporting_text: Show the friction your audience already feels.
images.visual_direction: Simple contrast between old way and better way.

images.headline: Reframe The Idea
images.supporting_text: Make the core belief easier to remember.
images.visual_direction: Bold typographic statement with one supporting icon.

images.headline: Give The Framework
images.supporting_text: Break the solution into a simple mental model.
images.visual_direction: Clean diagram with one central concept.

images.headline: Show The Example
images.supporting_text: Make the advice feel real and usable.

images.headline: Make It Actionable
images.supporting_text: Give the viewer one thing to do next.
images.visual_direction: Checklist style layout with one highlighted action.

images.headline: Save This
images.supporting_text: End with a clear recap and CTA.
images.visual_direction: Strong CTA card with brand colors and logo placement.
